name: Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle is a puzzle game where your drawings come to life to crush evil eggs! Whether you sketch a line or a shape, your creations will fall from above to smash the eggs. There is no right or wrong way, only creative ways! Analyze the location of the evil eggs, think through your strategy, and start drawing! Can you smash all the eggs with the fewest strokes? How to play Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle? Click or tap to draw! Who created Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle? Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle is created by HYPERCELL. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle for free? You can play Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Draw To Smash: Logic Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
